concepts.operational_trust: The evidence-backed ability of leadership to rely on cyber, AI, vendor, and governance systems under pressure.
concepts.decision_compression: The transformation of cyber complexity into executive action, ownership, and consequence visibility.
concepts.governance_continuity: The persistent memory of unresolved cyber decisions, accepted risks, remediation progress, and evidence age.
concepts.adversarial_operational_risk: Risk created when intelligent threat behavior intersects with organizational dependencies and leadership coordination limits.

advisory_model: CyberShield plus Maximum Justice Cybersecurity vCISO strategic advisory
